name: Mexican Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl and mix well.
2. Spread the mixture into an ungreased 8-inch square baking pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
4. Allow to cool completely before cutting into 64 one-inch squares.
From: Texas Department of Agriculture
Posted by: Sheila Exner - October 1991
